title: Go Markdown import local candidate
scope: Local/copied-DB-and-data Markdown import candidate for Prism notes.
implemented_behavior: Disabled by default; disabled POST drains request body and returns JSON 405.
Imports multipart .md file into Notes with first H1 title extraction, frontmatter category/type, tags, and source_urls/urls mapping.

Preserves existing /static/uploads references, bundles multipart local image parts into PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads, and attempts safe http/https remote image import through the existing SSRF-guarded upload-url downloader.
Removes unresolved local/remote image links to alt text instead of preserving broken external references.
Uses a single DB transaction and removes newly written upload files if DB commit fails.
production_boundary: Production owner remains Python. This local copied candidate does not deploy Pi, edit Caddy/systemd, change frontend defaults, touch production DB/files, remove Python, or promote live/default import ownership.
